scripts.test:coverage: rm -rf ../coverage .xtrace.log .bashcov-bin && mkdir -p .bashcov-bin && ln -sf "$(pwd)/.build/dev/bash-coverage-wrapper" .bashcov-bin/bash && BB_XTRACE_LOG="$(pwd)/.xtrace.log" PATH="$(pwd)/.bashcov-bin:$PATH" node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency 4 --test-timeout 30000 $(find . -name '*.test.ts' -not -path './node_modules/*') && node --import tsx .build/dev/generate-coverage.ts
